description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
Check out our other social media and product links:
https://linktr.ee/shedflips

We sold on all four platforms — EBAY, Poshmark, Mercari, and Etsy — and pulled over two dozen orders this morning, including a $199.99 Etsy mug, a $129.99 paintball lot, and a ribbon batch that's now made us $75 from a single $10 trash bag buy.

After a solid Friday sourcing run we gave ourselves the whole weekend off (Candice went camping with the Girl Scouts, Lonnie knocked out some other projects), and came back ready to get at it. The orders were stacked: Keen waterproof shoes, Blenko vases, vintage GI Joes, a Law & Order Renegades find, Ford F-150 floor mats, an Anheuser-Busch belt buckle, and a Bunny Mathews coffee mug set that sold on Etsy for $199.99 — one of our better single-item sales in a while. Plus the camera-off moment where Candice kept talking to y'all and I had no idea, and the bear soak vs. bear soap confusion that got a little out of hand.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
0:00 Welcome back — weekend off recap
1:30 Order pulls begin (all 4 platforms!)
1:55 35mm film lot, New Balance shoes + ribbon craft lot
3:15 Free People leather clogs, army sweatpants + Smashbox primer
5:37 GI Joe on card + Law and Order Renegades ($47.99)
6:38 Ford F-150 floor mats + PopMart figure
7:30 Keen waterproof shoes + flower brooch + Blenko vases ($40)
9:27 Shed Flips magnets + Stanley nesting cup
10:07 Misha serum + Nitrous Outlet hat + Ford shop manuals
11:49 Paintball gun lot ($129.99)
12:40 Urban Decay eyeliner + belt buckle + movie reel (+ camera mishap)
14:44 GI Joe DG figures + magic book + Bear Soak confusion
17:38 Poshmark: Lucchese boot shaft covers
18:43 Mercari: Harold the scarecrow mask ($35)
19:45 Etsy: $199.99 Bunny Mathews mug set
21:00 Outro

Thanks for hanging out in the shed with us. If you like watching real reselling life as it happens, subscribe and we'll see you in the next one. And if you want to get your name in the outro credits, the Shed Heads channel membership is $1.99/month — link below.

#reselling #ebay #garagesale #thrifting #shedflips
